authors.author: Geoff Bullock
Geoff Bullock
Ich will dich mehr als alles lieben

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Just let me say how much I love You Let me speak of Your mercy and grace Just let me live in a shadow of Your beauty Let me see You face to face

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And the earth will shake as Your Word goes forth And the heavens will tremble and fall But let me say how much I love You Oh my Savior, my Lord and Friend

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Just let me hear Your finest whispers As You gently call my name And let me see Your power and Your glory Let me feel Your spirit's flame

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Let me find You in the desert Till this sand is holy ground And I am found completely surrendered To You my Lord and Friend

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So let me say how much I love You With all my heart I long for You For I am caught in this passion of knowing This endless love I've found in You

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: /: And the depth of grace, the forgiveness found To be called a child of God Just makes me say how much I love You Oh my Savior, my Lord and Friend :/

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Just makes me say how much I love You Oh my Savior, my Lord and Friend
